title: Tameable Zombie Horse And Skeleton Horse
description: Make the Zombie Horse and Skeleton Horse Tameable like normal Horses!
body:
This mod allows zombie horses and skeleton horses to be tamed and ridden like regular horses!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581529384ad3ebbebe120636c65f4d3afcfaf2f8.png)
However, this mod does not make zombie horses and skeleton horses spawn naturally, so you might need a mod like Zombie Horse Spawn.
